message:
fix: gate sandbox nuke on MR creation success in gt done

gt done was destroying polecat worktrees even when MR bead creation
failed, causing completed work to be permanently lost. The mrFailed
flag was already set and reported to Witness, but never checked before
sandbox cleanup. Added !mrFailed to the cleanup gate, matching the
existing !pushFailed pattern.

Closes #1945

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
